# Skill: New Endpoint

Scaffold a new API endpoint following this project's exact patterns.

## When to use

When adding a new CRUD resource to the API.

## How to fill this in

1. Build your first endpoint manually (or let Architect build it from a plan).
2. Once it's working and reviewed, paste one of your router files below as the reference pattern.
3. Paste one of your schema files below as the reference pattern.
4. Paste one of your test files below as the reference pattern.

The agent will use these real examples to scaffold new endpoints that match your patterns exactly.

## Checklist (for the agent)

When scaffolding a new endpoint using the patterns above:

1. [ ] Create router file following the reference pattern
2. [ ] Create schema file (Create, Update, Response) following the reference pattern
3. [ ] Register the router in the main app file
4. [ ] Create test file following the reference pattern
5. [ ] Verify imports resolve
6. [ ] Run tests to confirm CRUD operations work
